problem id: 341a468c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(3)) XOR ROT(3)

examples:
  11100110 -> 00110111
  11110111 -> 00010111
  10100010 -> 00010101
  10000111 -> 00110100
  11111100 -> 00000111
  01000101 -> 00100010
  00111101 -> 10000001

query: 10100100
predicted answer: 00100101
